descriptions: Bounty Hunter Bloods and Hacienda Village Pirus signed a truce in 1992.
edges.evidence_quote: a truce that happened between the Grape Street Crips and their rivals, the PJ Watts Crips, as well as both of their rivals, the Hunter and Hacienda Bloods sets

descriptions: Grape Street Crips and Hacienda Village Pirus signed a truce in 1992.
edges.evidence_quote: a truce that happened between the Grape Street Crips and their rivals, the PJ Watts Crips, as well as both of their rivals, the Hunter and Hacienda Bloods sets

descriptions: PJ Watts Crips and Hacienda Village Pirus signed a truce in 1992.
edges.evidence_quote: a truce that happened between the Grape Street Crips and their rivals, the PJ Watts Crips, as well as both of their rivals, the Hunter and Hacienda Bloods sets

DLASTHR.description: Assyrian criminal organization active in southwestern Sydney, Australia, originating from the Assyrian Kings gang. Involved in drug trafficking, murders, and public shootings. Resurrected in the early 2000s under the name DLASTHR after the original gang dissolved following the murder of off-duty police officer David Carty in 1997.

descriptions: North Side Popes rival Assyrian Kings.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Assyrian Kings

descriptions: Brothers for Life absorbed DLASTHR, making it a part of the organization.
edges.evidence_quote: B4L took over in the area, absorbing the remnants of MBM, and prolific Assyrian street-gang DLASTHR (The Last Hour), including member Michael Odisho.

descriptions: Bronx Boys are listed as rivals of DLASTHR in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bronx Boys , True Kings

descriptions: DLASTHR is suspected of killing a former Nomads member.
edges.evidence_quote: ex- Nomads bikie gang member Adrian Buxton was fatally shot outside his home on 17 May 2016. In the aftermath of Hermiz’s killing, police came to suspect that the Assyrian criminal organisation may have been behind Buxton’s death

descriptions: DLASTHR engaged in a turf war with the True Kings over drug supply.
edges.evidence_quote: In the 2010s, gun violence was thought to be part of the gang's turf war over drug supply with its rival gang, the True Kings.

descriptions: DLASTHR and True Kings were in conflict over drug supply.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2016, conflict between DLASTHR and a young breakaway group known as 'True Kings', resulted in Drive by shootings, fire bombings and intimidation, as tensions over drug supply erupted between the two gangs.

'Ndrina Mazzaferro.description: The Mazzaferro are a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta based in Marina di Gioiosa Jonica, Italy. They are active in the homonymous Locale alongside the Aquino family, with whom they have been in conflict since the 1970s. They are involved in drug and arms trafficking, extortion, and have expanded into northern Italy and abroad, including Germany, Belgium, and the United Kingdom.

descriptions: Cataldo 'ndrina was part of a joint venture with several other 'ndrine for cocaine trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: A joint venture of 'Ndrangheta clans in the trafficking included the Barbaro 'ndrina (Platì), Ierinò 'ndrina (Gioiosa Ionica), Morabito 'ndrina (Africo), Mazzaferro 'ndrina (Gioiosa Ionica) and Pesce 'ndrina (Rosarno).

descriptions: Mazzaferro 'ndrina is listed as a rival of Cordì 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Cataldo 'ndrina , Mazzaferro 'ndrina , Costa 'ndrina, Ierinò 'ndrina

descriptions: Mazzaferro members were among the mandanti of Macrì's murder, acting with De Stefano.
edges.evidence_quote: i mandanti furono Paolo De Stefano, Vincenzo, Giuseppe e Francesco Mazzaferro, Giuseppe e Nicola Cataldo

descriptions: Vincenzo Mazzaferro fu ucciso dagli Jerinò per non aver mantenuto promesse.
edges.evidence_quote: Vincenzo Mazzaferro avrebbe fatto da tramite con lo Stato per la contrattazione, ma non mantenendo le promesse fu ucciso dagli Jerinò il 14 gennaio 1993

descriptions: Gli Ierinò sono alleati dei Mazzaferro.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati dei Mazzaferro dei Cataldo e dei Costa .

descriptions: Lo Presti and Mazzaferro are jointly hegemonic in Val di Susa.
edges.evidence_quote: È la famiglia della 'Ndrangheta egemone per eccellenza sul territorio della Val di Susa insieme a quella dei Mazzaferro .

descriptions: Lo Presti was originally part of Mazzaferro, then became a faction and later an independent 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: Nata inizialmente come intranea alla famiglia Mazzaferro , diventa una fazione e successivamente 'ndrina a sé.

descriptions: Mammoliti-Rugolo is allied with Mazzaferro.
edges.evidence_quote: I Mammoliti-Rugolo è alleata dei Piromalli , Varone e dei Mazzaferro .

descriptions: The Mancuso and Mazzaferro were involved together in the 'Ossessione' operation, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: operazione "Ossessione" ... insieme ai Mazzaferro per l' hinterland di Milano

descriptions: The Mazzaferro have contacts with the Barbaro.
edges.evidence_quote: ma hanno contatti anche con i Barbaro , i Calabrò, i Bruzzaniti , i Morabito e i Raso-Albanese

descriptions: The Mazzaferro have contacts with the Bruzzaniti.
edges.evidence_quote: ma hanno contatti anche con i Barbaro , i Calabrò, i Bruzzaniti , i Morabito e i Raso-Albanese

descriptions: The Mazzaferro have contacts with the Calabrò.
edges.evidence_quote: ma hanno contatti anche con i Barbaro , i Calabrò, i Bruzzaniti , i Morabito e i Raso-Albanese

descriptions: The Mazzaferro are allied with the Cataldo.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati con le 'ndrine degli Ierinò , dei Costa e dei Cataldo

descriptions: The Mazzaferro are allied with the Costa.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati con le 'ndrine degli Ierinò , dei Costa e dei Cataldo

descriptions: The Mazzaferro clan helped the De Stefano clan kill Macrì.
edges.evidence_quote: Macrì was killed with the help of the Cataldo and Mazzaferro clans.

descriptions: Mazzaferro and Femia were allied in the faida against Aquino-Scali.
edges.evidence_quote: faida che vede contrapposte da una parte gli Aquino-Scali e dall'altra i Mazzaferro-Femia

descriptions: The Mazzaferro and Femia are allied in the faida against Aquino-Scali.
edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni '70 entrano nel contrabbando delle sigarette e scoppia la faida che vede contrapposte ancora oggi da una parte gli Aquino -Scali e dall'altra i Mazzaferro-Femia .

descriptions: The Ierinò killed Vincenzo Mazzaferro, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 14 gennaio 1993 viene ucciso Vincenzo Mazzaferro da esponenti dei Ierinò per divergenze sul sequestro di Roberta Ghidini.

descriptions: The Mazzaferro are allied with the Ierinò.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati con le 'ndrine degli Ierinò , dei Costa e dei Cataldo

descriptions: The Mazzaferro are closely linked by family ties to the Lo Presti.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono strettamente legati da vincoli di parentela ai Lo Presti di Bardonecchia.

descriptions: The Mazzaferro were involved in an international drug trafficking ring with the Mancuso.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 29 gennaio 2019 si conclude l'operazione Ossessione che porta all'arresto di 25 persone, tra cui presunti esponenti dei Mancuso in sodalizio con criminali albanesi ... e con il criminale Giuseppe Campisi insieme ai Mazzaferro

descriptions: The Mazzaferro have contacts with the Morabito.
edges.evidence_quote: ma hanno contatti anche con i Barbaro , i Calabrò, i Bruzzaniti , i Morabito e i Raso-Albanese

descriptions: The Mazzaferro represented the Pesce in cocaine deals.
edges.evidence_quote: Oreste Pagano, collaboratore di giustizia racconta che il 30% della cocaina importata dalla Colombia dai Caruana era destinata ai Mazzaferro, essi rappresentavano anche i Barbaro , gli Ierinò , i Morabito , i Cataldo , i Pesce .

descriptions: The Mazzaferro have contacts with the Raso-Albanese.
edges.evidence_quote: ma hanno contatti anche con i Barbaro , i Calabrò, i Bruzzaniti , i Morabito e i Raso-Albanese

descriptions: The Mazzaferro and Aquino are in conflict since the 1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: I Mazzaferro sono una 'ndrina di Marina di Gioiosa Jonica attiva nell'omonimo Locale insieme agli Aquino , in contrasto tra di loro sin dagli anni '70.

descriptions: The Mazzaferro conducted drug trafficking together with the Cuntrera-Caruana in the 1990s.
edges.evidence_quote: Il commercio di stupefacenti negli anni '90 è stato fatto insieme ad alcune 'ndrine di Gioiosa Jonica e del clan siciliano agrigentino dei Cuntrera-Caruana.

descriptions: Ursino participated in port construction with Mazzaferro in the 1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni Settanta hanno partecipato alla costruzione del Porto di Gioia Tauro insieme ai Mazzaferro

descriptions: Aquino and Mazzaferro are in conflict since the 1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: attiva nell'omonimo Locale insieme ai Mazzaferro , in contrasto tra di loro sin dagli anni '70

descriptions: Aquino are rivals of Mazzaferro.
edges.evidence_quote: Secondo un collaboratore di giustizia negli ultimi anni si è avvicinata ed alleata agli Aquino , rivali dei Mazzaferro .

descriptions: Commisso cooperated with Mazzaferro in port construction.
edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni settanta hanno partecipato alla costruzione del porto di Gioia Tauro insieme ai Mazzaferro e agli Ursino.

descriptions: Listed as allies in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Orchard Park Trailblazers , Heath Street Gang, Academy Homes Gang, Villa Victoria Park Gang , Everton Geneva Grizzleys

descriptions: JI considers Free Papua Movement an opponent according to infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: State opponents United Nations, Malaysia, Indonesia, Non-state opponents Moro National Liberation Front, Moro Islamic Liberation Front, Free Papua Movement, Free Aceh Movement (until 2005), Abu Sayyaf (until 2024)

descriptions: Sabatino is a satellite clan of Pesce.
edges.evidence_quote: I Sabatino sono una loro cosca satellite.

descriptions: Sabatino clan allied with 'Ndrangheta 'ndrine in Vibo Valentia.
edges.evidence_quote: tra i Sabatino di San Severo con le 'ndrine di Vibo Valentia

edges.source: Asociación Campesina de Ganaderos y Agricultores del Magdalena Medio
descriptions: MORENA was formed by members of ACDEGAM.
edges.evidence_quote: In August 1989, the Movimiento de Restauración Nacional ("Movement of National Restoration", MORENA) was formed by members of ACDEGAM.

edges.source: Asociación Campesina de Ganaderos y Agricultores del Magdalena Medio
descriptions: MORENA was formed by members of ACDEGAM.
edges.evidence_quote: In August 1989, the Movimiento de Restauración Nacional (MORENA) was formed by members of ACDEGAM.

edges.target: Asociación Campesina de Ganaderos y Agricultores del Magdalena Medio
descriptions: ACDEGAM provided legal front and logistics for MAS, and MAS backed up ACDEGAM's threats with violence.
edges.evidence_quote: ACDEGAM worked to promote anti-labor policies, and threatened anyone involved with organizing for labor or peasants' rights. The threats were backed up by the MAS, which would come in and attack or assassinate anyone who was suspected of being a 'subversive'.

edges.target: Asociación Campesina de Ganaderos y Agricultores del Magdalena Medio
descriptions: MAS backed ACDEGAM's threats with violence.
edges.evidence_quote: ACDEGAM worked to promote anti-labor policies and threatened anyone involved with organizing for labor or peasants' rights. The threats were backed by the MAS

edges.target: Asociación Campesina de Ganaderos y Agricultores del Magdalena Medio
descriptions: ACDEGAM was created as a legal front for MAS and other paramilitary groups.
edges.evidence_quote: the Asociación Campesina de Ganaderos y Agricultores del Magdalena Medio ("Association of Middle Magdalena Ranchers and Farmers", ACDEGAM) was created to handle both the logistics and the public relations of the organization, and to provide a legal front for various paramilitary groups. The threats were backed up by the MAS

edges.source: Alliance des Patriotes pour un Congo Libre et Souverain
edges.target: Alliance Nationale des Congolais pour la Défense des Droits de l'Homme
descriptions: These four factions signed an agreement to halt hostilities among themselves, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: On 9 May, various armed factions—including the Alliance des Patriotes pour un Congo Libre et Souverain (APCLS), the Coalition des Mouvements pour le Changement/Forces de Défense du Peuple (CMC/FDP), the Nduma Défense du Congo-Rénové (NDC-R), and the Alliance Nationale des Congolais pour la Défense des Droits de l'Homme (ANCDH)—signed an agreement in Pinga, Walikale Territory, pledging to halt hostilities among themselves and align with the Congolese army.

edges.source: Alliance des Patriotes pour un Congo Libre et Souverain
edges.target: Coalition des Mouvements pour le Changement/Forces de Défense du Peuple
descriptions: These four factions signed an agreement to halt hostilities among themselves, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: On 9 May, various armed factions—including the Alliance des Patriotes pour un Congo Libre et Souverain (APCLS), the Coalition des Mouvements pour le Changement/Forces de Défense du Peuple (CMC/FDP), the Nduma Défense du Congo-Rénové (NDC-R), and the Alliance Nationale des Congolais pour la Défense des Droits de l'Homme (ANCDH)—signed an agreement in Pinga, Walikale Territory, pledging to halt hostilities among themselves and align with the Congolese army.

edges.source: Alliance des Patriotes pour un Congo Libre et Souverain
descriptions: These four factions signed an agreement to halt hostilities among themselves, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: On 9 May, various armed factions—including the Alliance des Patriotes pour un Congo Libre et Souverain (APCLS), the Coalition des Mouvements pour le Changement/Forces de Défense du Peuple (CMC/FDP), the Nduma Défense du Congo-Rénové (NDC-R), and the Alliance Nationale des Congolais pour la Défense des Droits de l'Homme (ANCDH)—signed an agreement in Pinga, Walikale Territory, pledging to halt hostilities among themselves and align with the Congolese army.

descriptions: Carl Williams switched allegiance from the Carlton Crew to the Williams Family in 2000.
edges.evidence_quote: Allegiance: The Carlton Crew (Until 2000) , The Williams Family (2000-2007)

descriptions: Trapasso is connected to Tropea-Talarico.
edges.evidence_quote: Sarebbero collegati con la cosca Tropea-Talarico di Cropani Marina .

descriptions: Alfieri and Casalesi were allied with Ferlito-Cappello.
edges.evidence_quote: i rivali Carmine Alfieri e i Casalesi erano alleati dei boss perdenti come Gaetano Badalamenti , Tommaso Buscetta e i clan catanesi Ferlito - Cappello

descriptions: Casalesi and Alfieri were allied with Ferlito-Cappello.
edges.evidence_quote: i rivali Carmine Alfieri e i Casalesi erano alleati dei boss perdenti come Gaetano Badalamenti , Tommaso Buscetta e i clan catanesi Ferlito - Cappello

Oaxaca Cartel.description: The Oaxaca Cartel was a smaller Mexican drug cartel operating in southern Mexico, particularly in Oaxaca and Chiapas. It focused on marijuana and cocaine trafficking and was allied with the Tijuana Cartel. Founded by Pedro Díaz Parada in the 1970s, the cartel was led by the Díaz-Parada brothers. It was active from 1980 to 2011.

descriptions: Juárez Cartel and Oaxaca Cartel were allies.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: La Línea (lead faction), Beltrán-Leyva Cartel (defunct), Barrio Azteca, Los Zetas, Oaxaca Cartel (defunct), Cali Cartel (defunct)

descriptions: The infobox lists the Juárez Cartel as an ally of the Oaxaca Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Tijuana Cartel , Juárez Cartel

descriptions: The Oaxaca Cartel operated at the service of the Tijuana Cartel, indicating a subordinate cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Oaxaca cartel ... was one of the smaller drug cartels operating in Mexico and at the service of the Tijuana Cartel

descriptions: The Oaxaca Cartel joined forces with the Tijuana Cartel in 2003, a cooperative alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: The Oaxaca cartel reportedly joined forces with the Tijuana Cartel in 2003

descriptions: Oaxaca Cartel joined forces with Tijuana Cartel in 2003.
edges.evidence_quote: The Oaxaca Cartel reportedly joined forces with the Tijuana Cartel in 2003.

descriptions: The Caltagirone Mafia maintains ties with the Nardo clan.
edges.evidence_quote: The clan maintains ties with other criminal groups, including the Santapaola-Ercolano of Catania and the Nardo clan of Lentini.

descriptions: Young Savages was a constituent gang that made up the original South Brooklyn Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Some of the gangs that made up the original South Brooklyn Boys were the South Brooklyn Devils, the Garfield Place Boys, the SB Angels, SB Diapers, the Wanderers, the Degraw St boys, the Sackett St Boys, the Butler Gents, the Gowanus Boys, the Kane St. Midgets, The Little Gents, and the Young Savages.

descriptions: Aknaf Bait al-Maqdis is listed as an ally in the infobox for 2015.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Aknaf Bait al-Maqdis (2015)

'Ndrina Soriano.description: The Soriano are a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta based in Filandari, Vibo Valentia, Italy. They are primarily involved in drug trafficking and extortion in the municipalities of Filandari and Jonadi. They have strong ties with the Mancuso 'ndrina. The group was heavily impacted by the Genesi trial (2000) and the Rotarico operation (2007).

descriptions: Soriano wanted to eliminate Accorinti boss Giuseppe Accorinti.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 6 marzo 2018 i carabinieri di Vibo Valentia con l'operazione Nemea arrestano a Filandari presunti elementi dei Soriano da cui emerge il voler eliminare il boss Giuseppe Accorinti

descriptions: Fiarè member Razionale was ambushed by Mancuso, who later killed Soriano, leader of the Soriano 'ndrina, indicating conflict between Fiarè and Soriano.
edges.evidence_quote: Saverio Razionale, il 25 settembre 1995 subisce un agguato ordito da Giuseppe Mancuso, detto Mbrogghja, il quale sarebbe poi l'autore materiale dell'omicidio di Roberto Soriano, capo-società dell' omonima 'ndrina della frazione Pizzinni di Filandari voluto dallo stesso Mancuso.

descriptions: The Soriano were in a feud with the Fiaré-Razionale in the 1990s.
edges.evidence_quote: Anni '90 - La faida con i Fiaré-Razionale

Clan Ascione.description: The Clan Ascione is a Camorra organization originating and operating in the Ercolano area of Italy. It emerged in the 1980s, defeating the Esposito clan in a local feud. The clan is involved in racketeering and other criminal activities. Its current status is unclear from the text.

descriptions: Clan Ascione is a Camorra clan involved in waste trafficking with Chinese gangs.
edges.evidence_quote: Tra i clan coinvolti in questa alleanza c'erano il clan dei Casalesi, il clan Fabbrocino e il clan Ascione.

descriptions: The Ascione and Birra clans have been in a long faida, with Ascione eventually prevailing.
edges.evidence_quote: seconda faida di Ercolano : faida decennale che vede coinvolti i clan Ascione e Birra

descriptions: The two clans have been in a violent feud for about ten years.
edges.evidence_quote: Da una decina d'anni, la seconda faida di Ercolano vede coinvolti gli Ascione contro i Birra.

descriptions: Ascione and Birra were rival clans engaged in a bloody feud over drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: La spartizione del traffico di stupefacenti ad Ercolano diede avvio ad una sanguinosa faida tra i due clan rivali, ovvero gli Ascione e i Birra.

descriptions: The passage describes multiple violent acts between Ascione and Birra-Iacomino, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Il clan Ascione è un sodalizio camorristico, originario ed operante nella zona di Ercolano.

descriptions: The two clans are in a violent conflict, with multiple murders and retaliations between them.
edges.evidence_quote: Il capoclan, allora, per placare la sua sete di vendetta, pretese di assistere all'esecuzione della missione di morte che aveva ordinato.

descriptions: The text mentions a 'faida' (feud) between the clans, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: ex killer del clan Birra-Iacomino, durante la faida

descriptions: Iengo-Birra is the same as Birra, so the feud is between Ascione and Iengo-Birra.
edges.evidence_quote: La spartizione del traffico di stupefacenti ad Ercolano diede avvio ad una sanguinosa faida tra i due clan rivali, ovvero gli Ascione e i Birra.

descriptions: The murder of Francesco Vitiello by the Iengo-Birra clan marked the start of a conflict between the two clans.
edges.evidence_quote: L'omicidio avvenuto per mano del clan Iengo-Birra, segnava l'inizio di una lotta tra i due clan.

descriptions: Ascione-Papale and Iacomino-Birra are mentioned as a combined group.
edges.evidence_quote: presunte affiliate al clan Ascione-Papale Iacomino-Birra

descriptions: Ciro Borrelli, a member of the Durantini clan, was targeted in an attempted murder, indicating a conflict with the Ascione clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Tentato omicidio di Ciro Borrelli, appartenente al clan Durantini, all'epoca dei fatti già legato alla 'cuparella'.

descriptions: The two clans were opposed in the first faida of Ercolano.
edges.evidence_quote: La prima faida di Ercolano vede contrapposti il clan degli Esposito contro il clan degli Ascione.

descriptions: Ascione and Esposito were in open war during the first faida.
edges.evidence_quote: Tra i due clan è ormai guerra dichiarata.

descriptions: The two clans jointly carried out a revenge killing.
edges.evidence_quote: Per vendicarsi i Fabbrocino e gli Ascione avrebbero ucciso Salvatore Batti

descriptions: Ascione-Papale killed a member of the Falanga clan.
edges.evidence_quote: L'omicidio del cutoliano Giuseppe Serra affiliato ai Falanga, l'omicidio avvenne per mano degli Ascione-Papale

descriptions: Falanga and Ascione-Papale had an agreement to share drug dealing territories in Torre del Greco.
edges.evidence_quote: Da un'indagine conclusa dall’ Arma dei Carabinieri nel mese di ottobre 2016 è emersa una netta sovrapposizione tra i Falanga e gli Ascione-Papale nella gestione delle piazze di spaccio , in ragione di un accordo funzionale alla spartizione condivisa degli affari illeciti su Torre del Greco .

descriptions: Clan Falanga was allied with Clan Ascione (Ascione-Papale) to supply drugs.
edges.evidence_quote: il gruppo, grazie all’alleanza con il più noto e pericoloso clan degli “Ascione-Papale”, egemone nel territorio di Ercolano, riforniva di stupefacenti il territorio vesuviano.

descriptions: Ascione-Papale and Luongo made a secret agreement to resist arrests and convictions.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel settembre 2019 emerge un accordo segreto tra due cosche specializzate in spaccio ed estorsioni. Da una parte gli Ascione-Papale, organizzazione criminale attiva a Ercolano e Torre del Greco . Dall’altra, la famiglia Luongo, dinastia della malavita con base a San Giorgio a Cremano .

descriptions: The Papale clan is involved in the second faida alongside the Ascione.
edges.evidence_quote: In questa faida sono coinvolti anche i Papale.

descriptions: The text suggests that the killer of Lavini (affiliated with Ascione) was linked to Papale, and the murder was part of a feud between Papale and Birra, implying Ascione and Papale are on the same side against Birra.
edges.evidence_quote: la probabile vicinanza del ventunenne Vincenzo Perna, killer di Lavini, al clan Papale, in quanto riconosciuta dal pentito Ciro Gaudino. Una nuova prospettiva, sicuramente, che inquadrerebbe quello scontro violento come espressione dell'odio fra le famiglie Papale e Birra

descriptions: The Papale clan was allied with Ascione in the faida against Birra.
edges.evidence_quote: Nella faida sono coinvolti anche i Papale

descriptions: Ascione and Papale are part of the same criminal group, Ascione-Papale.
edges.evidence_quote: C'è stato un momento durante la sanguinosa faida di Ercolano , precisamente poco prima del 2013 , in cui si è rischiato lo scontro interno nel clan Ascione-Papale tra il gruppo dei siciliani ovvero quelli della famiglia Papale e quelli invece che facevano capo a Ciro Montella o'lione.

descriptions: The text refers to a unified 'clan Ascione-Papale', indicating a merger or alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: affiliato al clan Ascione-Papale

descriptions: Ascione and Papale are part of the same group, often referred to as Ascione-Papale.
edges.evidence_quote: Il clan Ascione è un sodalizio camorristico ... affiliato agli Ascione-Papale

descriptions: The Esposito and Ascione clans fought a war in 1990.
edges.evidence_quote: prima faida di Ercolano : guerra tra gli Esposito e gli Ascione, combattuta quasi interamente nel 1990

descriptions: Ascione clan is an ally of Vollaro clan per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Ascione clan, Abate clan (defunct), Giuliano clan (defunct), Anastasio clan, Veneruso clan, Marfella clan

descriptions: Yoshimi-kogyo is a branch organization of Toa-kai.
edges.evidence_quote: The Toa-kai's notable branch organizations include the Yoshimi-kogyo ( 誼興業 ) .

descriptions: George Street carried out hits against Brick City leaders.
edges.evidence_quote: successful hits against leaders of rival gangs ( Southside , Brick City, Ghost Town ) in 2010

descriptions: YPG and Asayish jointly received training, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: Kurdish security forces (YPG and Asayish) began receiving human rights training from Geneva Call

descriptions: Gioffrè fought and won a feud against the Pellegrino clan in the 1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni Settanta vincono la faida di Seminara contro la 'ndrina dei Pellegrino.

descriptions: Santaiti won a feud against Pellegrino in the 1970s, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni '70 vincono la faida di Seminara contro la 'ndrina dei Pellegrino.

edges.source: Auto-Défense des Communautés Victimes de l'Ituri
edges.target: Coopérative pour le Développement du Congo / Union des Révolutionnaires pour la Défense du Peuple Congolais
descriptions: ADCVI is in conflict with CODECO/URDPC, engaging in provocative actions against them.
edges.evidence_quote: ADCVI engaged in provocative actions against rival groups, such as the Coopérative pour le Développement du Congo /Union des Révolutionnaires pour la Défense du Peuple Congolais (CODECO/URDPC)

descriptions: The Pino 'ndrina is allied with the Sena.
edges.evidence_quote: La 'ndrina Pino è una cosca malavitosa o 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta calabrese di Cosenza alleata dei Sena

descriptions: The Basile-Calvano allied with the Pino-Sena during the faida.
edges.evidence_quote: i Basile-Calvano di San Lucido

descriptions: The Cicero 'ndrina merged with the Perna and Pino-Sena.
edges.evidence_quote: A oggi i Perna dominano l'area e a queste due 'ndrine si sono uniti coloro che erano rimasti dei Perna - Cicero - Pranno e dei Pino-Sena.

descriptions: The Cirillo allied with the Pino-Sena during the faida.
edges.evidence_quote: e i Cirillo

descriptions: The Pino and Sena exchanged favors with the Condello and Fontana 'ndrine.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 6 agosto 1983 a Scalea vengono uccisi taluni Geria e Saffioti come scambio di favori alle 'ndrine del reggino di Pasquale Condello e Giovanni Fontana

descriptions: The Muto allied with the Pino-Sena during the faida.
edges.evidence_quote: con i Pino-Sena invece i Muto di Cetraro

descriptions: The Sena were part of the Pino-Sena faction in conflict with the Perna.
edges.evidence_quote: Scoppia subito dopo una faida tra le due famiglie.

descriptions: After the faida of the 1980s, the Sena merged into the Perna.
edges.evidence_quote: dopo la faida degli anni ottanta sono confluiti nella 'ndrina dei Perna

descriptions: Sho' Nuff is a rival biker gang to Sin City Deciples, with a conflict leading to a murder in 2009.
edges.evidence_quote: The murder, which took place on an interstate road in Birmingham, Alabama , stemmed from a gang conflict as Bevelle had been the president of a rival biker gang to the Sin City Deciples, Sho' Nuff.

descriptions: Naha Clan merged with Koza Clan to form Kyokuryu-kai in 1970.
edges.evidence_quote: The Kyokuryu-kai was formed in 1970 as the Okinawa-rengo Kyokuryu-kai by two gangs, the Naha Clan and the Koza Clan.

Aquino 'ndrina.description: The Aquino 'ndrina is a 'Ndrangheta clan based in Marina di Gioiosa Ionica, Italy, active since the 1970s. They are involved in extortion, usury, and international drug trafficking, with alliances with other 'ndrine such as Pesce-Bellocco, Alvaro, Morabito, Piromalli, and Commisso. Members have been arrested in multiple countries including Spain, Portugal, Netherlands, Canada, United States, Mexico, and Dominican Republic. The clan has been in conflict with the Mazzaferro-Femia clan since the 1970s.

descriptions: Alvaro, Pesce, and Coluccio-Aquino were involved together in international drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 17 giugno 2015 si conclude un'operazione ... che blocca un traffico internazionale di droga tra gli Alvaro, i Pesce e i Coluccio-Aquino

descriptions: The Bellocco are mentioned alongside Aquino-Coluccio and Piromalli in the Rent operation.
edges.evidence_quote: operazione Rent che scopre la presunta contiguità di 32 persone tra cui 12 imprenditori con esponenti degli Aquino-Coluccio e dei Piromalli e dei Bellocco

descriptions: Aquino 'ndrina is listed as an ally of Cordì 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Commisso 'ndrina , Aquino 'ndrina, Ursino 'ndrina

descriptions: Vincenzo Roccisano era broker comune per Jerinò, Aquino e Commisso.
edges.evidence_quote: Vincenzo Roccisano, di Gioiosa Jonica , broker degli Jerinò, degli Aquino e dei Commisso .

descriptions: Lo Presti had ties with Aquino.
edges.evidence_quote: Ha avuto legami con tutte le più importanti famiglie mafiose della Calabria e della Sicilia . I Belfiore , i Tripodo , i Mesiani Mazzacuva, i Ruga , gli Aquino , gli Ierinò , i Macrì , i Morabito , i Varacalli , i Cataldo , gli Strangio , i Barbaro , gli Alvaro , i Palamara , i Raso-Albanese e i Facchineri .

descriptions: Lo Presti recently allied with Aquino, who are rivals of Mazzaferro.
edges.evidence_quote: Secondo un collaboratore di giustizia negli ultimi anni si è avvicinata ed alleata agli Aquino , rivali dei Mazzaferro .

descriptions: The Mazzaferro and Aquino are in conflict since the 1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: I Mazzaferro sono una 'ndrina di Marina di Gioiosa Jonica attiva nell'omonimo Locale insieme agli Aquino , in contrasto tra di loro sin dagli anni '70.

descriptions: Morabito and Aquino were arrested together in Operation Metropolis.
edges.evidence_quote: 5 marzo 2013 si conclude l'operazione Metropolis ... che ha portato all'arresto di 20 persone, tra affiliati dei Morabito ... e degli Aquino

descriptions: Pesce was involved in international drug trafficking with Coluccio, Ierinò, Commisso, and Aquino.
edges.evidence_quote: per la 'ndrangheta c'erano presunti affiliati agli Ierinò , Commisso , Coluccio , Aquino e Pesce.

descriptions: Pesce was involved in international drug trafficking with Aquino, Ierinò, Commisso, and Coluccio.
edges.evidence_quote: per la 'ndrangheta c'erano presunti affiliati agli Ierinò , Commisso , Coluccio , Aquino e Pesce.

descriptions: Piromalli and Aquino-Coluccio were allegedly connected in obtaining public works contracts.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 25 ottobre 2016 si conclude l'operazione Rent che scopre la presunta contiguità di 32 persone tra cui 12 imprenditori con esponenti degli Aquino-Coluccio e dei Piromalli e dei Bellocco

descriptions: Ursino is allied with Aquino.
edges.evidence_quote: Gli Ursino sono una potente 'ndrina di Gioiosa Jonica , alleata degli Aquino di Marina di Gioiosa Jonica

descriptions: Aquino have agreements with Alvaro for international drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Hanno numerosi accordi in virtù dei traffici di droga internazionale con le altre 'ndrine tra cui: ... gli Alvaro di Sinopoli

descriptions: Aquino have agreements with Bellocco for international drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Hanno numerosi accordi in virtù dei traffici di droga internazionale con le altre 'ndrine tra cui: Pesce - Bellocco di Rosarno

descriptions: Aquino and Mazzaferro are in conflict since the 1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: attiva nell'omonimo Locale insieme ai Mazzaferro , in contrasto tra di loro sin dagli anni '70

descriptions: Aquino are rivals of Mazzaferro.
edges.evidence_quote: Secondo un collaboratore di giustizia negli ultimi anni si è avvicinata ed alleata agli Aquino , rivali dei Mazzaferro .

descriptions: Aquino have agreements with Morabito for international drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Hanno numerosi accordi in virtù dei traffici di droga internazionale con le altre 'ndrine tra cui: ... i Morabito di Africo

descriptions: Aquino have agreements with Pesce for international drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Hanno numerosi accordi in virtù dei traffici di droga internazionale con le altre 'ndrine tra cui: Pesce - Bellocco di Rosarno

descriptions: Aquino have agreements with Piromalli for international drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Hanno numerosi accordi in virtù dei traffici di droga internazionale con le altre 'ndrine tra cui: ... i Piromalli di Gioia Tauro

descriptions: Aquino and Scali were allied in the faida against Mazzaferro-Femia.
edges.evidence_quote: faida che vede contrapposte da una parte gli Aquino-Scali e dall'altra i Mazzaferro-Femia

descriptions: The Aquino and Scali are allied in the faida against Mazzaferro-Femia.
edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni '70 entrano nel contrabbando delle sigarette e scoppia la faida che vede contrapposte ancora oggi da una parte gli Aquino -Scali e dall'altra i Mazzaferro-Femia .

descriptions: Schirripa was part of an alliance with Coluccio, Aquino, and Macrì.
edges.evidence_quote: la quale faceva parte di un'alleanza con i Coluccio, gli Aquino e i Macrì

descriptions: Aquino have agreements with Commisso for international drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Hanno numerosi accordi in virtù dei traffici di droga internazionale con le altre 'ndrine tra cui: ... i Commisso di Siderno

descriptions: Aquino managed drug trafficking together with Cartel del Golfo and Colombian cartels.
edges.evidence_quote: Il traffico veniva gestito insieme al Cartello del Golfo e ai cartelli colombiani

descriptions: Ierinò, Commisso, Coluccio, Aquino, and Pesce managed drug trafficking together with Cartel del Golfo.
edges.evidence_quote: Il traffico veniva gestito insieme al Cartello del Golfo e ai cartelli colombiani , per la 'Ndrangheta c'erano presunti affiliati agli Ierinò , Commisso , Coluccio, Aquino e Pesce

descriptions: Aquino-Coluccio made an agreement with Los Zetas for cocaine trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: L'accordo con i Los Zetas è avvenuto dopo l'arresto dell' ecuadoriano Luis Calderon

descriptions: Alvaro, Pesce, and Coluccio-Aquino trafficked drugs together with a FARC commander.
edges.evidence_quote: blocca un traffico internazionale di droga tra gli Alvaro , i Pesce e i Coluccio-Aquino insieme ad un comandante delle FARC colombiane

descriptions: Commisso (as Macrì) cooperated with Aquino in cocaine purchases.
edges.evidence_quote: Schirripa comprava 10 chili di cocaina al mese per conto delle famiglie Macrì, Aquino e Coluccio.

descriptions: Commisso (as Macrì) cooperated with Coluccio in cocaine purchases.
edges.evidence_quote: Schirripa comprava 10 chili di cocaina al mese per conto delle famiglie Macrì, Aquino e Coluccio.

descriptions: Locale di Piscopio has solid contacts with Aquino di Marina di Gioiosa Jonica.
edges.evidence_quote: Dalle operazioni Minotauro e Crimine si evince che la locale ha solidi contatti ... nel resto della Calabria con ... gli Aquino di Marina di Gioiosa Jonica

descriptions: The Coluccio clan is part of the Toronto-area Siderno Group.
edges.evidence_quote: The Toronto-area Siderno group has included the Coluccio ... crime families

Al-Shabaab.description: Sunni Islamist militant group based in Somalia, formed in the mid-2000s as a youth militia within the Islamic Courts Union. It controls territory in south and southwestern Somalia, is allied with al-Qaeda, and has carried out numerous high-fatality attacks in Somalia and neighboring countries. Despite territorial losses after 2011, it remains active with an estimated 7,000–18,000 fighters.

descriptions: Al-Shabaab harbored al-Qaeda leaders and declared allegiance, but al-Qaeda largely ignored them.
edges.evidence_quote: Somali Islamist organization Al-Shabaab occasionally harboured al-Qaeda leaders in Somalia, in exchange for their technical assistance. In September 2009, in a video entitled 'At Your Service Osama', Al-Shabaab members publicly declared allegiance to bin Laden—but this reflected an 'unrequited courtship', largely ignored by al-Qaeda.

descriptions: Al-Shabaab is a direct affiliate of al-Qaeda.
edges.evidence_quote: Al-Qaeda has the following direct affiliates: - Al-Shabaab

descriptions: AQAP and al-Shabaab are allies.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Non-state allies al-Shabaab (2009–present)

descriptions: AQAP's newspaper featured content from other al-Qaeda affiliates, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: interviews and messages from leaders in Al-Qaeda core, Al-Qaeda in the Islamic Maghreb, Al-Qaeda in the Indian Subcontinent and Al-Shabaab being featured

descriptions: Al-Shabaab has clashed with Ahlu Sunna Waljama'a.
edges.evidence_quote: Al-Shabaab has clashed with the pro-AMISOM Sufi militias of "Ahlu Sunna Waljama'a".

descriptions: Al-Hijra is the official Kenyan wing of Al-Shabaab.
edges.evidence_quote: Al-Shabaab has Kenya-based affiliates, with al-Hijra as its official Kenyan wing from 2012

descriptions: Many early Al-Shabaab leaders previously belonged to al-Ittihad al-Islamiya.
edges.evidence_quote: Many of its early leaders and members previously belonged not only to the Islamic Courts Union but also to the older al-Ittihad al-Islamiya

descriptions: Al-Shabaab is allied with al-Qaeda.
edges.evidence_quote: It is allied to the pan-Islamist militant organization al-Qaeda

descriptions: Al-Shabaab is allied with Al-Qaeda.
edges.evidence_quote: It is allied to the pan-Islamist militant organization al-Qaeda

descriptions: Al-Shabaab pledged allegiance to Al-Qaeda in 2012, becoming an official affiliate.
edges.evidence_quote: Al-Shabab members pledged allegiance to al-Qaeda in 2012 and has reportedly forged ties with al-Qaeda in the Islamic Maghreb , and al-Qaeda in the Arabian Peninsula .

descriptions: Al-Shabaab has forged ties with AQAP.
edges.evidence_quote: has forged ties with other insurgent groups like AQIM and AQAP

descriptions: Al-Shabaab has forged ties with AQIM.
edges.evidence_quote: has forged ties with other insurgent groups like AQIM and AQAP

descriptions: Al-Shabaab attempted to coordinate activities with Boko Haram.
edges.evidence_quote: In June 2012, General Carter Ham of the U.S. Army said that Al-Shabaab, al-Qaeda in Islamic Maghreb (AQIM), and the Nigeria-based Boko Haram were attempting to coordinate their activities, including in funding, training, and explosives.

descriptions: Hizbul Islam merged into Al-Shabaab after military defeats.
edges.evidence_quote: Hizbul Islam, a smaller group of Somali militants, was merged with Al-Shabaab: after suffering military defeats against Al-Shabaab in southern towns, Hizbul Islam was officially absorbed by its former rival in December 2010.

descriptions: Hizbul Islam split from Al-Shabaab.
edges.evidence_quote: on September 24, 2012, Hizbul Islam announced that it would split from Al-Shabaab

descriptions: Al-Shabaab is alleged to be allied with Houthis, though denied.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Houthis (alleged, denied)

descriptions: Al-Shabaab and Houthis have a growing relationship involving weapons and training.
edges.evidence_quote: There is a growing relationship between the al-Shabaab and Houthis. The former has pledged to escalate piracy off Somalia in exchange for more advanced weapons and training. The United Nations reported physical meetings occurring between the two militant groups in February 2025.

descriptions: Al-Shabaab originated as a youth militia within the ICU's military wing.
edges.evidence_quote: Formed in the mid-2000s as a youth militia within the wider military wing of the Islamic Courts Union

descriptions: Al-Shabaab clashed violently with ISIL after rejecting its overtures.
edges.evidence_quote: The groups clashed violently on several occasions, most fiercely during 2015, and Al-Shabaab's internal security service continued to arrest, and sometimes execute, suspected ISIS supporters within Al-Shabaab's ranks.

descriptions: Al-Shabaab is in competition with Islamic State in Somalia.
edges.evidence_quote: possibly motivated by competition with Islamic State in Somalia

descriptions: Islamic State in Somalia is a splinter group from Al-Shabaab.
edges.evidence_quote: In October 2015, senior Al-Shabaab commander Abdul Qadir Mumin and approximately 20 of his followers in Puntland pledged allegiance to ISIL, establishing what became Islamic State in Somalia (ISIS).

descriptions: Al-Shabaab lists Islamic State Somalia Province as an opponent.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... Islamic State Somalia Province (Abnaa ul-Calipha)

descriptions: Al-Shabaab lists Jama'at Nusrat al-Islam wal-Muslimin as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Jama'at Nusrat al-Islam wal-Muslimin

descriptions: Jaysh Ayman is a Kenya-based affiliate unit of Al-Shabaab.
edges.evidence_quote: then with a unit established in 2013 known as Jaysh Ayman

descriptions: The pirate network supplies al-Shabaab with weapons.
edges.evidence_quote: These pirates do, however, also supply ISS' rival in Puntland, al-Shabaab, with weapons and other materials.

descriptions: al-Shabaab is an alleged ally of Houthis.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... al-Shabaab (alleged)

descriptions: Houthis and Al-Shabaab have a transactional relationship that deepened over time.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2024 a UN report states that Al-Shabaab and Houthis had a relationship that was "transactional or opportunistic, and not ideological", while a 2025 report states that their relationship was deepening and posed a threat to regional security.

descriptions: IS lists Al-Shabaab as a non-state opponent, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Other non-state opponents: al-Qaeda, al-Nusra Front, Al-Qaeda in the Arabian Peninsula, Al-Qaeda in the Islamic Maghreb, Al-Shabaab, Taliban, Hamas, Hezbollah, Houthis, Kurdistan Workers' Party, Syrian Democratic Forces, ...

descriptions: ISMP emerged from the Mozambican Al-Shabaab group.
edges.evidence_quote: It emerged out of the Mozambican Islamist group Al-Shabaab.

descriptions: ISS and al-Shabaab are declared enemies, with active conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: ISS is also the declared enemy of al-Shabaab , which considers the Islamic State a significant threat to its own predominance among Jihadist factions in Somalia.

descriptions: ISS evicted al-Shabaab from contested area, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: In course of 2020's first half, ISS gradually increased the number of its attacks, while its troops evicted al-Shabaab from the contested area around Dasaan, Mudug region.

descriptions: ISSP formed from defectors of Al-Shabaab.
edges.evidence_quote: elements within the Somali Islamist group Al-Shabaab defected and pledged allegiance to IS.

descriptions: Al-Shabaab pledged allegiance to the Taliban government.
edges.evidence_quote: Many designated terror groups have pledged their allegiance to the new Taliban government, these groups include: Al-Qaeda , al Shabaab , Boko Haram , Jama'at Nasr al-Islam wal-Muslimin and Turkistan Islamic Party , Tehreek-e-Taliban Pakistan , Harkat-ul-Mujahideen .

descriptions: Kaplan's gang and Orgen's gang fought over labor slugging operations.
edges.evidence_quote: Kaplan and Orgen soon began fighting over protection of wet wash laundry workers in violent shootouts around New York.

descriptions: After the alliance broke, the two gangs engaged in a violent war.
edges.evidence_quote: A violent war between the two soon began; fighting, particularly in the garment district, continued until Johnny Spanish was killed while leaving a Manhattan restaurant by three men, most likely including Kaplan, on July 29, 1919.

descriptions: Kaplan's gang and Spanish's gang were initially allied, then became rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: The two gangs were allied for a while before a bitter personal rivalry developed between the Dropper and Johnny Spanish.
